mapper.sql: Id, ModelNo, Ecode, Country_id, Quantity, Price_OverSea, Reto, Cust_Tax, Qtt_Type, Weight, Trans_Fee, Other_Fee, Price_StdRMB, Upddate, APPartNumber
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.OverSea_Model_Price
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.OverSea_Model_Price (Id, ModelNo, Ecode, Country_id, Quantity, Price_OverSea, Reto, Cust_Tax, Qtt_Type, Weight, Trans_Fee, Other_Fee, Price_StdRMB, Upddate, APPartNumber ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{countryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{priceOversea,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reto,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{custTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{qttType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{priceStdrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{appartnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.OverSea_Model_Price
Id,
ModelNo,
Ecode,
Country_id,
Quantity,
Price_OverSea,
Reto,
Cust_Tax,
Qtt_Type,
Weight,
Trans_Fee,
Other_Fee,
Price_StdRMB,
Upddate,
APPartNumber,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{countryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{priceOversea,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{reto,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{custTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{qttType,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

#{priceStdrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{appartnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.OverSea_Model_Price
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Ecode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
Country_id = #{record.countryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price_OverSea = #{record.priceOversea,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Reto = #{record.reto,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Cust_Tax = #{record.custTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Qtt_Type = #{record.qttType,jdbcType=CHAR},
Weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Trans_Fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Other_Fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Price_StdRMB = #{record.priceStdrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Upddate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
APPartNumber = #{record.appartnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.OverSea_Model_Price set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Ecode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, Country_id = #{record.countryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Price_OverSea = #{record.priceOversea,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Reto = #{record.reto,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Cust_Tax = #{record.custTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Qtt_Type = #{record.qttType,jdbcType=CHAR}, Weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Trans_Fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Other_Fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Price_StdRMB = #{record.priceStdrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Upddate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, APPartNumber = #{record.appartnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.OverSea_Model_Price
ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Ecode = #{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
Country_id = #{countryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price_OverSea = #{priceOversea,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Reto = #{reto,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Cust_Tax = #{custTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Qtt_Type = #{qttType,jdbcType=CHAR},
Weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Trans_Fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Other_Fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Price_StdRMB = #{priceStdrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Upddate = #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
APPartNumber = #{appartnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.OverSea_Model_Price set ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Ecode = #{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, Country_id = #{countryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Price_OverSea = #{priceOversea,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Reto = #{reto,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Cust_Tax = #{custTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Qtt_Type = #{qttType,jdbcType=CHAR}, Weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Trans_Fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Other_Fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Price_StdRMB = #{priceStdrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Upddate = #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, APPartNumber = #{appartnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
